creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
lang/tcl84 needs patch-generic-tclPort.h, which already exists in
tcl85 and tcl86. Without it, the lang/expect port fails to build in
redports.

Fix: PORTNAME=	tcl
 DISTVERSION=	8.4.20
+PORTREVISION=	1
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	lang tcl
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_TCLTK} \
